title: sorghum vulgare var. sudanense
intro: Sorghum vulgare var. sudanense, also known as Sudan sorghum or Sudan grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the sorghum family and is native to Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sudan sorghum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Sudan sorghum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
